name: lesswrong-mcp
description: Read-only search and retrieval for LessWrong and the Alignment Forum.
long_description: Query LessWrong and the Alignment Forum as tools: full-text search; fetch a post's full body and metadata; comment threads; user profiles; tag/wiki pages; sequences; front-page feeds; and precise filtering by author, tag, date range, and karma. Both forums share one backend; no authentication required. All tools are read-only.

tools.name: lw_search
tools.description: Full-text search across both forums over posts, comments, tags, users, and sequences.

tools.name: lw_get_post
tools.description: Fetch a post's full body and metadata by id or slug.

tools.name: lw_get_user
tools.description: Fetch a user profile and their top posts.

tools.name: lw_get_tag
tools.description: Fetch a tag / wiki page and its posts.

tools.name: lw_get_sequence
tools.description: Fetch a sequence and its ordered list of posts.

tools.name: lw_list_feed
tools.description: List a front-page feed (latest / recent / curated / home).

tools.name: lw_filter_posts
tools.description: Filter posts by author, tag, date range, and karma with a sort order.
